name: SignalTerrain
mission: The observatory deck — contours, horizon, sky, and the ground beneath your boots. Navigation and terrain reading for students of the outdoors.
learnToday: Reading contour lines: ridge, draw, saddle, and spur on a topographic map
How aspect affects temperature and moisture on the same hill
Using the horizon and sun position for rough bearing — backup to compass
Why turning back is a navigation skill, not a failure
comingSoon: Interactive contour map lessons for Pike County terrain
Aspect and sun-angle reference for field planning
Weather window reading for safe ridge walks
Private route journal with turnaround notes
Night sky orientation basics for Northeast latitudes

preview.title: Read the ground
preview.description: SignalTerrain is a map on the trailhead wall — not a GPS replacement. Study contours during the week, then walk a hill this weekend and name the features under your boots. The tool teaches terrain literacy so you need the screen less, not more.
